creator: markd@Kermodei.COM
text:
Upgrading from 3.3 to 3.4.  Enter selection of components to install and
enter <space> over custom.  A signal 11 is then caught. Reproduced twice.

How-To-Repeat: 
Can be repeated on a running system by extracting the sysinstall program
from the mfsroot floppy image and then running sysinstall on a booted system.
